description: Hub module cards and ribbon taskpane targets. Edit this file, then mirror new ribbon entries in manifest.xml (VersionOverrides → Resources → bt:Urls and Menu Items). Per-module settings: taskpane/{id}/{id}.module.json (e.g. cluster.module.json) loaded by that module’s cluster-config.js; hub list stays here.

modules.name: Univariate
modules.desc: Explore a single variable — summarise its distribution, test for normality, and detect outliers.
info: Mean, median, mode, SD, skewness, kurtosis

modules.name: Correlations
modules.desc: Measure linear and rank-based relationships between pairs of variables with significance testing.

modules.name: Independent Means
modules.desc: Compare the means of two independent groups, with checks for equal variance and non-parametric alternatives.

modules.name: ANOVA
modules.desc: Test for differences across three or more groups using one-way, two-way, or factorial designs.

modules.name: Repeated Measures
modules.desc: Analyse within-subject designs where the same participants are measured at multiple time points or conditions.

modules.name: Mixed Model
modules.desc: Model nested or longitudinal data with both fixed treatment effects and random subject-level variation.

modules.name: Regression
modules.desc: Predict a continuous outcome from one or more predictors, with full diagnostic and model-fit reporting.

modules.name: Logistic Regression
modules.desc: Model the probability of a binary or categorical outcome from a set of predictor variables.

modules.name: Factor Analysis
modules.desc: Uncover the latent structure in a set of variables by extracting underlying common factors.

modules.name: PCA
modules.desc: Reduce many correlated variables to a smaller set of uncorrelated principal components that capture maximum variance.

modules.name: K-means Clustering
modules.desc: Partition observations into k groups by iteratively assigning cases to the nearest centroid.
info: Runs in the task pane — no cloud round-trip

modules.name: Hierarchical Clustering
modules.desc: Build an agglomerative merge tree and cut it at k to label clusters — with a full dendrogram.
info: Sizes, merge steps & assignments at k
Runs in the task pane — no cloud round-trip

modules.name: Meta-Analysis
modules.desc: Pool effect sizes across multiple studies to obtain a precise overall estimate with heterogeneity assessment.

ribbonMenu.label: Statistico
ribbonMenu.supertipDescription: Open the hub or jump directly to a module.

items.label: Analytics Hub
items.tooltip: Browse and launch all analysis modules.

items.label: Cluster Analysis
items.tooltip: K-means and hierarchical clustering on your sheet data.

items.label: PCA
items.tooltip: Principal component analysis — builder and dashboard.
